tweets.full_text:
Okay, just made the repo for Small Harness public, and Open Source. This is the first official release from @getsmallai ✨

I have a very simple mission - make it easier for people to run models locally on normal hardware, no custom AI PC with a 3090 required.

What I think makes me different is that I'm not coming into this as an expert, but instead, pretty much a total noob who is learning more every day.

I literally started coding Small Harness yesterday using @OpenRouter's create-agent-tui, which I'm super impressed with btw!

Small Harness started in TypeScript, then last night I ported everything to Rust because I want this to be as fast as possible. I love Rust 🦀

The idea with this harness is to make it super small, with very limited tool calls, and as bare bones as possible. 

Right now, it has support for Ollama, LM Studio, MLX and OpenRouter. 

The target user isn't someone with a badass 3090 setup and an at home AI lab, it's someone with a four year old M1 Mac Studio with 32gb of ram, or even someone with a 16gb M4 Mac Mini that wants to play around with local AI.

This is about 24-hours old, so expect things to get better over time, but for now, jump in and play, and I'd love your feedback, and hopefully a star or two if people actually like it.

tweets.full_text:
Everyone’s talking about MegaETH TGE… but almost no one is breaking down the ecosystem.

Trading, AI, gaming, prediction markets all live already.

This is bigger than a token launch.🧵👇
-------------------
𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐄𝐱𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞:

➢ @GTE is a unified trading venue bringing together spot, perps, and lending CLOBs under one roof with perfect capital efficiency across all three markets, letting users arbitrage lending and funding rates in real time.

➢ @valhalla_defi is the fully onchain perp DEX on MegaETH offering composable contracts, real-time pricing, and fair market execution that eliminates MEV manipulation.

➢ @Euphoria_fi is a mobile-first derivatives trading platform that transforms complex financial instruments into an intuitive, gamified experience.

➢ @kumbaya_xyz is a real-time DEX on MegaETH used for swapping, trading ecosystem tokens, memecoins, and providing first-liquidity for new assets
-------------------

𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐢𝐧𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐋𝐢𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐲:

➢ @CapLabs_ is positioning itself as MegaETH's stablecoin engine that produces USD, BTC, and ETH-denominated stablecoins and executes arbitrage loops in real time.

➢ MegaUSD (USDm) is MegaETH's native stablecoin, developed in partnership with @ethena , maintaining a 1:1 peg to the USD backed by Ethena's USDtb. Yield generated from USDm reserves is used to subsidize user transactions and fund ecosystem incentives.

➢ @brix_money is a yield tokenization platform live on MegaETH mainnet that brings sovereign yield from emerging markets onchain through tokenized, custodied RWA, enabling a new class of yield-bearing stablecoins.
-------------------

𝐃𝐞𝐅𝐢 𝐨𝐧 𝐌𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐄𝐓𝐇:

➢ @worldmarketsinc is a lending platform on MegaETH combining leveraged strategies and margin trading, merging the best mechanics of Morpho and Gearbox into a next-gen real-time money market.

➢ @LoraFinance Finance is a DeFi protocol for renting asset price exposure on MegaETH with second-by-second fees and no liquidation risk.

➢ @nunchi is a protocol for trading risks associated with yield-bearing assets, letting users hedge or speculate on yield fluctuations across MegaETH's growing DeFi stack.

➢ @Blackhaven is a reserve-backed liquidity engine for MegaETH, offering principal-protected notes and fixed-term bonds. Its self-reinforcing treasury leverages real-time execution to capture treasury.

➢ @flytrade_ is a cross-chain liquidity aggregation protocol, routing swaps across chains to find the best execution for users entering and moving liquidity within the ecosystem.

➢ @_canonic operates the world's first Midpoint Anchored Order Book (MAOB) spot exchange, running a fully on-chain central limit order book on MegaETH.

➢ @dreaming is a mobile app for options trading (on BTC, ETH, etc.) with leverage, zero gas fees, and no liquidations.

➢ @hitdotone is an arcade finance, it is a crypto trading platform offering up to 1000x on real markets, while highlighting top daily "hits" and wins.
-------------------

𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐤𝐞𝐭𝐬 𝐨𝐧 𝐌𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐄𝐓𝐇:

➢ @userocket_app is creating the concept of a redistribution market, turning price speculation from a static experience into a dynamic, social, mobile-first one.

➢ @eventlymarket is a prediction markets platform on MegaETH. They highlight real-time execution tied to MegaETH's performance, enabling quick creation of community-relevant bets on niche topics, rumors, or daily crypto events.

➢ @clutchpredict runs real-time prediction markets for livestreamed video games, letting users bet on granular in-game events with dynamic onchain odds
-------------------

𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝐓𝐨𝐤𝐞𝐧 𝐋𝐚𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐬 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐈𝐃𝐎𝐬:

➢ @RainMakr_xyz is an all-in-one launchpad featuring RainPump (a fair launch meme platform), and RainLaunch (primary IDO platform). 100% of fees are used to buy back the RAIN token.
-------------------

𝐆𝐚𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐨𝐧 𝐌𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐄𝐓𝐇 𝐢𝐬 𝐟𝐮𝐧:

➢ @Showdown_TCG is an on-chain collectible card game that combines the strategy of classic trading card games with the intensity of heads-up poker. It is one of the 10 confirmed live mainnet apps that triggered the TGE countdown.

➢ @stompdotgg is an on-chain native gaming experience built on MegaETH's real-time execution.

➢ @pumpparty is a live interactive game show designed to onboard millions into crypto, where participants can simultaneously chat, stream, and win prizes in a real-time environment powered by MegaETH.

➢ @xeetdotai runs a gamified social arena where creators compete in brand-sponsored tournaments and trade cards for real engagement rewards.

➢ @AveForge is a competitive mech battle arena on MegaETH where players risk and clash in skill-based fights to earn rewards.
-------------------

𝐀𝐈 𝐨𝐧 𝐌𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐄𝐓𝐇:

➢ @TryNectarAI is a platform focused on creating virtual companions, allowing users to interact with AI girlfriends, boyfriends, and anime characters.

➢ @RainMakr_xyz includes RainAI, a dedicated AI agent launchpad that lets anyone spin up, launch, and trade AI agents sitting alongside its meme.
-------------------

𝐈𝐧𝐟𝐫𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐂𝐫𝐨𝐬𝐬-𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐢𝐧:

➢ @Stake_Stone is an onchain autonomous neo bank powering an open onchain value network for humans, AI, and machines with yield, payments, and compliance. Has a new produtc, @stone_wallet.

➢ @Chainlink joined at mainnet launch with Chainlink live at MegaETH's Monday launch, users immediately gained access to Aave, GMX, and nearly $14B in flagship DeFi assets, including Lido's wstETH and Lombard's BTC.

➢ @blitzo is a gamified payments app for Gen Z that turns everyday transactions into viral, memeable, and monetizable moments, with crypto as the invisible backend engine.

➢ @getubitel provides affordable, privacy-focused eSIM data plans for 200+ countries, blending global connectivity with decentralized, onchain-settled telecom infrastructure.

➢ @dotmegadomains runs .mega domain registrations for MegaETH ecosystem, integrating with apps/wallets and donating sales proceeds to builders.

➢ @thewarren_app is building the first 100% onchain web hosting on MegaETH, enabling permanent, censorship-resistant blogs and sites with token-gated paywalls via fractal tree storage.
-------------------

𝐍𝐅𝐓𝐬 𝐨𝐧 𝐌𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐄𝐓𝐇:

➢ @TheFluffleNFT is the flagship 10,000 soulbound NFT collection from MegaLabs. Each NFT cumulatively represents at least 5% of the MegaETH network and evolves based on user activity.

Which MegaETH projects are you bullish on? Drop it in the comment

KAMUI CODE CLI リリース🎉

自分のエージェントにて、「node パッケージのkamuicodeを使ってオーディオあり猫動画8秒作成」と伝えるだけ。

GPT-Image 2、Seadance、Kling、Elevenlabs、ありとあらゆるクリエイティブAIを組み合わせ、

「大量生成」を可能とするもので、

Codex アプリ、Cowork、Codex CLI、Claude Code、Gemini CLI、

「あらゆるエージェント」から呼び出しのできます。

＊ 別途外部サービスのキー設定と課金が必要です。
＊外部キーはローカルにおく場合AIが読まないか目視チェックを、自律駆動させる場合はキーチェーンやクラウド保管するなどお願いいたします。
＊MITライセンス

tweets.full_text:
株を30年やってきたから、もう一度だけ言う。
完全に爆発するのは時間の問題…
昨日グーグルが新型AI半導体発表
消費電力1,000分の1の新半導体「スピン電子工学」。
でも本当にヤバいのはその次。
半導体チップ製造量は想像をはるかに超え
次に注目すべきは「ファウンドリ」です。
日本はこの分野のグローバルリーダーです! !
 TSMC、NVIDIA、Appleすでに日本国内最先端ファウンドリと提携済み。
熊本県に2400人の従業員を抱えるファンドリーがあり,次世代半導体チップを開発しています
システムは半導体チップの電力消費を約60%削減できる
現在160円台 → 将来性高い銘柄
今の日本株好調相場で入れば、上昇期待できる
5万円投資で大きな可能性あり
これ以上知られたら人気出ちゃうかも…  
👍すぐに銘柄名教えるね！
